---
name: Take POS Web Task
description: "Use when the task is clearly for pos-web Next.js work such as App Router pages, dashboard UI, auth flows, middleware, route handlers, or web-specific behavior."
argument-hint: "Describe the web task"
agent: pos-project-executor
---
Handle the user's task end-to-end for `pos-web`.

- Treat `pos-web` as the target project unless the request clearly requires another project.
- Read and follow `pos-web/AGENTS.md` before editing.
- Inspect the relevant Next.js files before making changes.
- Keep changes aligned with App Router patterns and existing dashboard structure.
- Validate with the smallest useful web check.
